/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/test_CNN.dir/test_CNN.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_CNN.dir/__/src/CNN.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_CNN.dir/__/src/ConvLayer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_CNN.dir/__/src/ConvLayer3D.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_CNN.dir/__/src/DenseLayer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_CNN.dir/__/src/shared.cpp.o -o test_CNN  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest_main.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/11/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
